Name: AreaParam
Description: Defines parameters related to map area, such as mimicry objects and lock-on values.

Fields.Name: Enable Invasion
Fields.Description: If enabled, invasions are allowed in this area.

Fields.Name: Lock-On ID
Fields.Description: The lock-on parameters to use by default in this area.

Fields.Name: Lock-On ID (Darkness)
Fields.Description: The lock-on parameters to when within darkness in this area.

Fields.Name: Lock-On ID (Torch)
Fields.Description: The lock-on parameters to use when a torch is wielded in this area.

Fields.Name: Prioritize Torch Lock-On ID
Fields.Description: If enabled, the torch lock-on parameters are prioritized over the others.

Fields.Name: Is Abyss
Fields.Description: If enabled, this area is considered the Abyss.

Fields.Name: Water Material
Fields.Description: The hit material to use on water contact within this area.

Fields.Name: Camera ID
Fields.Description: The camera parameters to use by default for this area.

Fields.Name: Player Light SFX ID
Fields.Description: The player light SFX to use for this area.

Fields.Name: Water SFX ID for Fall Landing
Enable Chameleon Object
Fields.Description: If enabled, chameleon objects may occur in this area.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Weight: 1
Fields.Description: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 1.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Weight: 2
Fields.Description: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 2.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Weight: 3
Fields.Description: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 3.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Weight: 4
Fields.Description: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 4.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Weight: 5
Fields.Description: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 5.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object: 1
Fields.Description: The chameleon object for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object: 2
Fields.Description: The chameleon object for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object: 3
Fields.Description: The chameleon object for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object: 4
Fields.Description: The chameleon object for slot 4.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object: 5
Fields.Description: The chameleon object for slot 5.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Angle: 1
Fields.Description: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Angle: 2
Fields.Description: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Angle: 3
Fields.Description: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Angle: 4
Fields.Description: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Angle: 5
Fields.Description: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Height: 1
Fields.Description: The height correction for this chameleon object.

Fields.Description: The height correction for this chameleon object.

Fields.Name: Chameleon Object Height: 3
Fields.Description: The height correction for this chameleon object.
